_comment: Confluence pages we actively monitor. Add entries via confluence-missing.js discovery or manually. Update 'synced' to today's date after ingesting a page (via confluence-ingest.js or manually). 'resources' is an optional list of resource article paths this page is known to inform — used as hints during ingestion, not a 1:1 mapping.

pageId.title: string — page title
pageId.synced: YYYY-MM-DD | null — date we last ingested this page into resource articles
pageId.resources: string[] (optional) — resource article paths this page informs
